<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/zmscore/ * * Returns the scores associated with the specified members * in the sorted set stored at key. * * For every member that does not exist in the sorted set, a null value is returned. */ class ZMSCORE extends RedisCommand { /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function getId() { return 'ZMSCORE'; } }
